kw.name: Create Session
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=foodie, url=http://localhost:5000/api/v1, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:5000/api/v1/admin/reset path_url=/api/v1/admin/reset headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.31.0', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '0'} body=None

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:5000/api/v1/restaurants path_url=/api/v1/restaurants headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.31.0', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '101', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"name": "Spice Garden", "category": "Indian", "location": "North", "images": [], "contact": "98765"}'

POST Response : url=http://localhost:5000/api/v1/restaurants status=201, reason=CREATED headers={'Server': 'Werkzeug/3.1.3 Python/3.13.9', 'Date': 'Sat, 21 Feb 2026 15:06:04 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '165', 'Connection': 'close'} body={ "approved": false, "category": "Indian", "contact": "98765", "enabled": true, "id": 1, "images": [], "location": "North", "name": "Spice Garden" }

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: PUT On Session
kw.doc: Sends a PUT request on a previously created HTTP Session.
kw.msg: PUT Request : url=http://localhost:5000/api/v1/restaurants/1 path_url=/api/v1/restaurants/1 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.31.0', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '21', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"location": "South"}'

PUT Response : url=http://localhost:5000/api/v1/restaurants/1 status=200, reason=OK headers={'Server': 'Werkzeug/3.1.3 Python/3.13.9', 'Date': 'Sat, 21 Feb 2026 15:06:06 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '165', 'Connection': 'close'} body={ "approved": false, "category": "Indian", "contact": "98765", "enabled": true, "id": 1, "images": [], "location": "South", "name": "Spice Garden" }

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: PUT On Session
kw.doc: Sends a PUT request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:5000/api/v1/restaurants/1/dishes path_url=/api/v1/restaurants/1/dishes headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.31.0', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '108', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"name": "Paneer Tikka", "type": "Veg", "price": "15.0", "available_time": "All Day", "image": "paneer.jpg"}'

POST Response : url=http://localhost:5000/api/v1/restaurants/1/dishes status=201, reason=CREATED headers={'Server': 'Werkzeug/3.1.3 Python/3.13.9', 'Date': 'Sat, 21 Feb 2026 15:06:10 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '173', 'Connection': 'close'} body={ "available_time": "All Day", "enabled": true, "id": 1, "image": "paneer.jpg", "name": "Paneer Tikka", "price": "15.0", "restaurant_id": 1, "type": "Veg" }

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: PUT On Session
kw.doc: Sends a PUT request on a previously created HTTP Session.
kw.msg: PUT Request : url=http://localhost:5000/api/v1/dishes/1/status path_url=/api/v1/dishes/1/status headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.31.0', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '18', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"enabled": false}'

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:5000/api/v1/users/register path_url=/api/v1/users/register headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.31.0', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '87', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"name": "John Doe", "email": "john_robot_29a428@example.com", "password": "secret123"}'

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.
kw.msg: GET Response : url=http://localhost:5000/api/v1/restaurants/search?name=Spice&location=South status=200, reason=OK headers={'Server': 'Werkzeug/3.1.3 Python/3.13.9', 'Date': 'Sat, 21 Feb 2026 15:06:16 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '188', 'Connection': 'close'} body=[ { "approved": true, "category": "Indian", "contact": "98765", "enabled": true, "id": 1, "images": [], "location": "South", "name": "Spice Garden" } ]

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:5000/api/v1/orders path_url=/api/v1/orders headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.31.0', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '49', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"user_id": 1, "restaurant_id": 1, "dishes": [1]}'

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:5000/api/v1/ratings path_url=/api/v1/ratings headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.31.0', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '60', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"order_id": 1, "rating": "5", "comment": "Excellent food!"}'

kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:5000/api/v1/admin/feedback path_url=/api/v1/admin/feedback headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.31.0', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: DELETE On Session
kw.doc: Sends a DELETE request on a previously created HTTP Session.
kw.msg: DELETE Request : url=http://localhost:5000/api/v1/dishes/1 path_url=/api/v1/dishes/1 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.31.0', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '0'} body=None

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: DELETE On Session
kw.doc: Sends a DELETE request on a previously created HTTP Session.
kw.msg: DELETE Request : url=http://localhost:5000/api/v1/restaurants/1 path_url=/api/v1/restaurants/1 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.31.0', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '0'} body=None

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Delete All Sessions
kw.doc: Removes all the session objects
